description: Plugin-distributed hooks for people-ops-hr. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags mechanically-detectable people-ops anti-patterns (a policy/handbook doc that opines on employment law instead of flagging it for counsel; a comp band with no leveling; an interview scorecard with no anchored levels). Set HR_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
